provenance.notes: Processed 3 quotes from 4 verse files. Source: HistoricalChristianFaith/Commentaries-Database. License: PUBLIC DOMAIN.

data.author: Pope Zephyrinus
data.quote:
For unjust judgments are to be guarded against by all, especially however by the servants of God. "And the servant of the Lord must not strive".
For the universal Church which has been redeemed by the blood of Christ, and aid all who serve the Lord, and give help to all who live piously by apostolic authority. All who will live

data.author: Pope Zephyrinus
data.quote: Assist ye, therefore, one another in good faith, and by deed and with a hearty will; nor let any one remove his hand from the help of a brother, since "by this "saith the Lord, "shall all men know that ye are my disciples, if ye have love one to another."

data.author: Pope Zephyrinus
data.quote: Who also has thundered through His servants, saying, "Vengeance is mine, I will repay."
